title: Gold dropped 100 points this morning. I was already positioned. Here's why.
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
XAU/USD was showing one of the cleanest setups I've seen this month.

Not because gold was "due" for a move. Because the structure was screaming it.

What I was watching on the 15M : — Price sitting right on a major demand zone after a sharp liquidation wick — EMA 200 flattening — dynamic support aligning with the zone — Sellers exhausted — no follow through on the last push down — Clean invalidation below the gray box — risk was defined

Setup before entry : Stop : 0.55% / $26,155 risk Target : 1.09% / $52,284 RR : 2.0

Result : +$236

Gold is one of the most emotional markets to trade right now with macro news everywhere.

Structure cuts through the noise every time.

\[screenshot\]

Anyone else positioning on XAU this week or sitting out with all the volatility?

comments.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
comments.body:
